scripts.benchmark:isolated:quick: BENCHMARK_MEMORY=0 BENCHMARK_ISOLATED=1 BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS=10000 BENCHMARK_RUNS=1 node --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts
scripts.benchmark:batch: BENCHMARK_MEMORY=0 BENCHMARK_ONLY=v4-batch,kafkajs-batch BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS=100000 BENCHMARK_RUNS=5 node --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts
scripts.benchmark:batch:quick: BENCHMARK_MEMORY=0 BENCHMARK_ONLY=v4-batch,kafkajs-batch BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS=10000 BENCHMARK_RUNS=3 node --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts
scripts.benchmark:memory:quick: BENCHMARK_MEMORY=1 BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS=10000 BENCHMARK_RUNS=1 node --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts
scripts.benchmark:profile:gc: mkdir -p .profiles && BENCHMARK_MEMORY=0 BENCHMARK_ONLY=${BENCHMARK_ONLY:-v4-batch} node --trace-gc --trace-gc-nvp --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts > .profiles/gc-trace.log 2>&1 && echo "GC trace: .profiles/gc-trace.log"
scripts.benchmark:profile:v8: mkdir -p .profiles && rm -f .profiles/isolate-*-benchmark-v8.log .profiles/v8-processed.txt && BENCHMARK_MEMORY=0 BENCHMARK_ONLY=${BENCHMARK_ONLY:-v4-batch} node --prof --logfile=.profiles/benchmark-v8.log --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts && node --prof-process .profiles/isolate-*-benchmark-v8.log > .profiles/v8-processed.txt && echo "Processed V8 profile: .profiles/v8-processed.txt"
